replies.msg: 一隻layer7 既firewall 可以做哂你想做既野同capture application log, depens on 你firewall feature support 到邊，server for capture purpose通常係做network equipment 既syslog server. 同埋而家好多野上cloud, 大公司好多都越黎越唔會set 隻server for network purpose, 因為冇必要。

一隻layer7 既firewall 可以做哂你想做既野同capture application log, depens on 你firewall feature support 到邊，server for capture purpose通常係做network equipment 既syslog server. 同埋而家好多野上cloud, 大公司好多都越黎越唔會set 隻server for network purpose, 因為冇必要。
